records.question: Which female students named Schmidt, aged at least 26 and living in WAS, spend exactly 50 hours per week on sports and are not on scholarship?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE student.age >= 26 AND student.sex = 'F' AND student.city_code = 'WAS' AND sportsinfo.hoursperweek = 50 AND student.lname = 'Schmidt' AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT S.StuID
FROM Student S
JOIN SportsInfo SI ON S.StuID = SI.StuID
WHERE S.LName = 'Schmidt'
  AND S.Age >= 26
  AND S.Sex = 'F'
  AND S.city_code = 'WAS'
  AND SI.HoursPerWeek = 50
  AND SI.OnScholarship = 'N'

records.question: Which students named Susan are at most 16 years old, play Lacrosse with exactly 41 games, and are on scholarship?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'Y' AND student.fname = 'Susan' AND student.age <= 16 AND sportsinfo.gamesplayed = 41 AND sportsinfo.sportname = 'Lacrosse'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Student.StuID
FROM Student
INNER JOIN SportsInfo ON Student.StuID = SportsInfo.StuID
WHERE Student.Fname = 'Susan'
  AND Student.Age <= 16
  AND SportsInfo.SportName = 'Lacrosse'
  AND SportsInfo.GamesPlayed = 41
  AND SportsInfo.OnScholarship = 'Y'

records.question: Which students from ATL who are at most 20 years old with an advisor number no more than 8772 have played exactly 100 hours of the Role-playing game Grand Term Assignment?

SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN video_games ON plays_games.gameid = video_games.gameid
WHERE video_games.gtype = 'Role-playing game' AND student.advisor <= 8772 AND student.age <= 20 AND student.city_code = 'ATL' AND plays_games.hours_played = 100 AND video_games.gname = 'Grand Term Assignment'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.StuID
FROM Student s
JOIN Plays_Games pg ON s.StuID = pg.StuID
JOIN Video_Games vg ON pg.GameID = vg.GameID
WHERE s.city_code = 'ATL'
  AND s.Age <= 20
  AND s.Advisor <= 8772
  AND vg.GName = 'Grand Term Assignment'
  AND vg.GType = 'Role-playing'
GROUP BY s.StuID
HAVING SUM(pg.Hours_Played) = 100

records.question: Which female students named Linda advised by 1121 play Athletics without a scholarship, spend exactly 2 hours per week on it, have played at most 5 games, and have spent at least 15 hours playing games overall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played >= 15 AND student.fname = 'Linda' AND sportsinfo.gamesplayed <= 5 AND sportsinfo.sportname = 'Athletics' AND student.sex = 'F' AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N' AND sportsinfo.hoursperweek = 2 AND student.advisor = 1121
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.StuID
FROM Student s
JOIN SportsInfo si ON s.StuID = si.StuID
JOIN Plays_Games pg ON s.StuID = pg.StuID
WHERE s.LName = 'Linda'
  AND s.Sex = 'F'
  AND s.Advisor = 1121
  AND si.SportName = 'Athletics'
  AND si.HoursPerWeek = 2
  AND si.GamesPlayed <= 5
  AND si.OnScholarship = 'N'
GROUP BY s.StuID
HAVING SUM(pg.Hours_Played) >= 15

INNER JOIN SportsInfo si ON s.StuID = si.StuID
WHERE s.LName = 'Linda'
  AND s.Advisor = 1121
  AND s.city_code = 'BAL'
  AND s.Major <= 600
  AND si.SportName = 'Athletics'
  AND si.OnScholarship = 'N'

records.question: Which students play the video game where the name is Call of Destiny?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN video_games ON plays_games.gameid = video_games.gameid
WHERE video_games.gname = 'Call of Destiny'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT S.StuID
FROM Student S
JOIN Plays_Games PG ON S.StuID = PG.StuID
JOIN Video_Games VG ON PG.GameID = VG.GameID
WHERE VG.GName = 'Call of Destiny'

records.question: Who are the male students majoring exactly in 550?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
WHERE student.major = 550 AND student.sex = 'M'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT StuID
FROM Student
WHERE Sex = 'M' AND Major = 550

records.question: Which students who live in city code BAL, have the last name Smith, are at least 18 years old, have advisor 1121, have related plays_games records, and have related sportsinfo records where onscholarship is exactly N?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE student.city_code = 'BAL' AND student.lname = 'Smith' AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N' AND student.age >= 18 AND student.advisor = 1121

records.question: What students from BAL city have an advisor number at least 1121, play Athletics without a scholarship, and spend at most 35 hours playing games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE sportsinfo.sportname = 'Athletics' AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N' AND student.advisor >= 1121 AND plays_games.hours_played <= 35 AND student.city_code = 'BAL'

records.question: Which female students from BAL city play the Collectible card game RNG Stone for exactly 35 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN video_games ON plays_games.gameid = video_games.gameid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played = 35 AND video_games.gname = 'RNG Stone' AND student.city_code = 'BAL' AND student.sex = 'F' AND video_games.gtype = 'Collectible card game'

records.question: Which students have an advisor number at least 1121, have played games for at most 15 hours, and also have related records in both plays_games and sportsinfo?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE student.advisor >= 1121 AND plays_games.hours_played <= 15
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.StuID
FROM Student s
INNER JOIN Plays_Games pg ON s.StuID = pg.StuID
INNER JOIN SportsInfo si ON s.StuID = si.StuID
WHERE s.Advisor >= 1121 AND pg.Hours_Played <= 15
